10.reason: [The output format requires space-separated integers and a newline, but puts() adds only a newline and does not insert spaces between digits. Also, str is not null-terminated properly for multi-digit numbers (though N<=10 so digits are single), but more critically, the expected output format uses space separation which puts() doesn't provide.]
